channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti tag on old brown brick wall next to 136 Westbridge Road SW11 3PF, 12th April
item.description:
Black spray tag graffiti AemRKs on plaster
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Westbridge Road, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White parking line not replaced after recent resurfacing, 12th April
item.description:
The white parking guideline in front of the driveway of 87 Blackbrook Lane was not replaced with the other road markings after the recent resurfacing. So close to the school it is very necessary.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Tower Court estate, 12th April
item.description:
People keep dumping rubbish and furniture on our estate and it's really unfair and unsightly. Please can you sanction people or at least try and stop them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Bazalgette Way, London, 12th April
item.description:
I am reporting a second, much larger fly-tipping incident at the same location. This new pile is blocking a significant portion of the road and includes heavy white goods (fridge/freezer and washing machine), a mattress, shelving, and a large volume of textiles and bagged waste. Given the size and the fact it is obstructing the highway, this requires urgent removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 12th April
item.description:
Again more in the same spot, it makes this a horrible place to live. There is no respect for neighbours

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and rubbish bags, 12th April
item.description:
Fly tipping on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch broken off on peninsular, 12th April
item.description:
Part of a tree has broken off and is now at edge of pond on peninsular. That is the green area almost opposite Court road entrance off the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping Ground, 12th April
item.description:
Rubbish thrown in the alleyway. Been there this whole afternoon. The alleyway here is a dumping ground. Repeated fly tipping of any kind. Disgraceful and disgusting. Second report in two days. Constant flow of rubbish thrown here. Please implement fines and install cameras. People are tired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whittington Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New Intersection Paving, 12th April
item.description:
The work recently done to this intersection makes it impossible to see where the pavement ends and road begins. This is dangerous to any extreme user including children, the elderly or anyone with sensory impairment. It’s also dangerous to drivers and cyclists as the stone is uniform in appearance throughout including the islands.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anglers Lane, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part of a bed frame dumped outside the entry gates to Edgar Wallace close on the footpath, 12th April
item.description:
Part of a bed frame dumped outside the entry gates to Edgar Wallace close on the footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edgar Wallace Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree branches dumped on footpath outside gates Edgar Wallace close, 12th April
item.description:
Large tree branches dumped on footpath outside gates Edgar Wallace close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edgar Wallace Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle Outside 94, 12th April
item.description:
Blue VW Transporter van registration GD18 DCZ parked close to 94 Barnfield Wood Road. Police National Compuer shows that vehicle is uninsured. It is also shown in trade with no current registered keeper.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip Lincoln council bag, 12th April
item.description:
This area near the friends container has regularly been used as a base for fly tipping particularly these purple Lincoln city bags.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole, 12th April
item.description:
The pothole has been here for over 6 months it it is deep and now has scraped all my left side alloy wheel due to it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarnton Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste collection missed, 12th April
item.description:
Food waste collection missed along Crescent way all food bins remain full despite other recycling and garden waste pickup for Crescent way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-25, Crescent Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the garage area of the abandoned council building, 12th April
item.description:
Mattresses Human waste Smell of cannabis and Chemical that burns the back of my daughters throat Random general food and recycling waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coventry Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: It is difficult to get into and out of my drive when vehicles are parked in that corner. Additionally, when larger vehicle come round that corner it is also difficult for them. There should be double yellow lines on that corner., 12th April
item.description:
It is difficult to get into and out of my drive when vehicles are parked in that corner. Additionally, when larger vehicle come round that corner it is also difficult for them. There should be double yellow lines on that corner

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edinburgh Crescent, Waltham Cross
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle, 12th April
item.description:
Untaxed vehicle constantly parked in minden road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minden Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak flooding pavement on Poverest Road near Poverest Primary School, 12th April
item.description:
There is a continuous water leak affecting the pavement on Poverest Road, outside/adjacent to 165A and close to Poverest Primary School. The water appears to be coming from the water meter chamber and is pooling across the footway. The standing water is spreading over a large section of the pavement and is not draining properly. Debris and leaves are collecting in the area, which may be contributing to blocked drainage. This is causing a slip hazard for pedestrians and forcing people to walk around it, potentially onto the road. The issue is particularly concerning given the proximity to a primary school, where children and parents regularly walk past. The problem appears to be ongoing rather than temporary and may indicate a leak or drainage issue that requires investigation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Poverest Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on walkway, 12th April
item.description:
Fly tipping in walkway next to 24 sandy hill road. Toys, punching, small fridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
